title: STATUS Double Light Switch | White 2 Gang 2 Way Light Switch | S2G2WLS10
features: 5000 DPI & 1MS LATENCY - A PixArt optical sensor (PMW-3325) with 5 selectable DPI levels (400/800/1600/3200/5000) supports customisable sensitivity; A low 1ms latency ensures minimal delay between device and gameplay
